div.head: The Chargé in China (Strong) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Hong Kong, October 6, 1949—9 a. m.
[Received October 6—8:27 p. m.]

div.p: Cantel 1167. Chief of American section of Foreign OfficeChen Tai-chu. October 3 inquired as to plan of US Government forwarding $75 million approved by [Congress?Under the Mutual Defense Assistance Act of 1949, approved October 6; 63 Stat. 714.] for discretionary use by President and whether RFCReconstruction Finance Corporation. advance funds to be applied to China prior to actual appropriation of funds.

I replied Embassy had no knowledge of any plan which would [not] require first a policy decision. Until such decision no disbursements will be made. However, I stated would approach Department for available information on matter.
